ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental transaction */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Date of the rental transaction */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Weather condition for the rental transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Customer who rented the bikes */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of bike rented */,
  "num_bikes_rented" INTEGER /* Number of bikes rented */,
  "casual" INTEGER /* Number of casual rentals */,
  "registered" INTEGER /* Number of registered rentals */,
  "total_rentals" INTEGER /* Total number of rentals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_bike_type FOREIGN KEY ("bike_type") REFERENCES bike_types ("bike_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather record */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Apparent temperature */,
  "hum" REAL /* Humidity */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "weathersit" INTEGER /* Weather situation */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES dates ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season */,
  "yr" INTEGER /* Year */,
  "mnth" INTEGER /* Month */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Holiday */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Day of the week */,
  "workingday" INTEGER /* Working day */,
  "day_type" TEXT /* Type of day */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dates_weekday FOREIGN KEY ("weekday") REFERENCES weekdays ("weekday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dates_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dates_yr FOREIGN KEY ("yr") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dates_workingday FOREIGN KEY ("workingday") REFERENCES working_days ("working_day_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dates_holiday FOREIGN KEY ("holiday") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dates_mnth FOREIGN KEY ("mnth") REFERENCES months ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "season_description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year */,
  "year_description" TEXT /* Description of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  "month_description" TEXT /* Description of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "holiday_description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekdays" (
  "weekday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weekday */,
  "weekday_name" TEXT /* Name of the weekday */,
  "weekday_description" TEXT /* Description of the weekday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weekday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "working_days" (
  "working_day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each working day */,
  "working_day_name" TEXT /* Name of the working day */,
  "working_day_description" TEXT /* Description of the working day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("working_day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_types" (
  "bike_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike type */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of bike */,
  "bike_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the bike type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_type_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each rental transaction
Weather condition for the rental transaction
Unique identifier for each weather record
Unique identifier for each date record
Unique identifier for each working day
Unique identifier for each bike type
